transition.intent: Move to pipeline-boundary-hardening only after public-safe job plan, service plan, Job DSL export, and service pipeline validation pass.
transition.validation_command: pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/show-jenkins-job-plan.ps1 -EnvironmentPreset dev -Format json && pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/show-service-pipeline-plan.ps1 -Format json && pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/export-jenkins-job-dsl.ps1 -EnvironmentPreset dev -OutputPath out/jenkins/seed-job-dsl.groovy && pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/validate-service-pipelines.ps1
transition.transition_validation_command: pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/show-jenkins-job-plan.ps1 -EnvironmentPreset dev -Format json && pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/show-service-pipeline-plan.ps1 -Format json && pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/export-jenkins-job-dsl.ps1 -EnvironmentPreset dev -OutputPath out/jenkins/seed-job-dsl.groovy && pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts/validate-service-pipelines.ps1
transition.decision_rule: All required gates must be passed, machine-checkable, or waived before changing current_phase.

phase_model.purpose: Stabilize public-safe Job DSL generation and service pipeline catalog validation.
Document Job DSL, Pipeline DSL, and JCasC boundaries plus controller-free regression strategy.
blocked_work: controller-dependent validation requirements for public defaults

phase_model.purpose: Maintain the public Jenkins template after readiness gates are complete.
blocked_work: new Jenkins platform scope without an explicit phase

required_gates.description: The dev job plan command must pass.
The service pipeline plan command must pass.
The Job DSL export command must pass.
Service pipeline validation must be public-safe and covered by fixture or catalog-only checks.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in job-dsl-coverage and fix public-safe service pipeline validation.
